prompt: Create a dark cinematic high-fashion editorial portrait of a mysterious veiled figure wearing an elaborate midnight navy and black pleated couture gown with glossy wet-look fabric, long flowing draped sleeves, and a translucent veil cascading from the head and shoulders. The figure is centered slightly right, shown from the upper body, with the head and face deliberately covered by a flat opaque dark gray rectangular censorship block placed over the face area. Add ornate metallic beadwork, tiny jewels, chains, and gold highlights along the veil and bodice, catching sparse light. Use a moody smoky charcoal blue-black studio background with low-key lighting, deep shadows, subtle film grain, and a dramatic chiaroscuro fashion-photography look. The fabric should fan outward in sweeping pleated arcs to the left and right, emphasizing texture, folds, shimmer, and movement. Wide horizontal composition, 16:9 aspect ratio, no text, no logo, no watermark.
